pi_items.source: setup_task.sh python generation script lines 9-11 and 28-36

privileged_info_summary: The task dataset is synthetically generated via a python script in setup_task.sh. The generation logic specifically programs 'sub-99' as the anomaly (failing to switch to local focus, causing low accuracy), confirming it as the contaminated participant. The expected output files are explicitly required to be at /home/ga/pebl/analysis/navon_report.json and /home/ga/pebl/analysis/navon_interaction_plot.png.
